channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists shrink a powerful laser onto a chip after 20 years of effort
item.description: EPFL researchers have created a chip-scale ultrafast laser that matches the performance of traditional tabletop femtosecond lasers.

item.title: Goethe never knew this 40-million-year-old ant was hidden in his collection
item.description: Scientists examining amber from Goethe's personal collection found three hidden fossil insects, including an extinct ant.

item.title: Beluga whales frequently change mates, potentially aiding species survival
item.description: Beluga whales in Alaska's Bristol Bay have long kept their mating habits secret. DNA analysis of over 600 belugas reveals frequent mate-switching.

item.title: Scientists crack an 'undruggable' pancreatic cancer target, nearly doubling survival
item.description: Pancreatic cancer has long been among the deadliest cancers with few treatments. A new drug, daraxonrasib, targets the KRAS protein and nearly doubles survival.
